title: Restore GA4 Tags
assignees: Barnes, Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Matthew Nyahari, Predrag
description:
Domain: arroofing.com
Summary: The client has reported that GA4 tracking appears to have stopped functioning on their website. They are requesting it be restored as soon as possible.
Client Goal: Have GA4 tracking restored and functioning correctly across the site.
Requirements for Completion:
  • GA4 tracking is firing correctly across all pages of arroofing.com
  • GA4 data is populating in the client's Google Analytics account
  • AM is notified once tracking has been confirmed live and verified

title: Add 2nd check box on forms
description:
Please add a 2nd check box for their forms on the site. Same as what was done to the Integrity forms.
https://arroofing.com/ 

Texts to use:
By submitting, you authorize Integrity A-R Roofing to reach out via phone, email, or text for explicit information about project needs. We will never share your personal information with 3rd parties for marketing purposes or spam you. You can opt out at any time. Message/data rates apply. Consent is not a condition of purchase. 


Thanks much

title: Check Blog Post
assignees: Clayton Coombs, Johan Cilliers, Mubeen Dildar-Mia
description:
Domain: https://arroofing.com/

Seeking help from SEO - Please look for this blog post: "Recent Hailstorms Hit North Kansas City: What Homeowners Need to Know Now" and see if it has been posted.

Message from the client:

"Hello - I have submitted a blog post but do not see it showing up on the website. Could someone look into this for us? It was published today, a couple of hours ago. Title: Recent Hailstorms Hit North Kansas City: What Homeowners Need to Know Now"

title: Web traffic analytics
description: Is there anything we could point April toward to help her see web traffic somewhere other than Google Analytics?

title: contact page updates
description:
This email was from April with AR roofing. She's looking to update and optimize the contact page for conversions. Please review her suggestions and let me know what we can do for her

email:
Clixsy Team - 

After deeply analyzing our social conversion rates, we believe we need to update our landing pages asap. We would love your input and expertise on this as well. If you see other opportunities for increasing our conversion rates, please let us know. 


Our findings are below. This is based on desktop. Our mobile looks substantially better. 

Our main landing page: 
https://arroofing.com/

- This one is okay. we like that "Get started today" is towards the top, but it could be even more visible. (see All States below) 
- AI/Stock gentleman at bottom needs to go away. This image should be a drone footage of beautifully completed project or at minimum a photo. 

Our FREE ESTIMATE landing page: 
https://arroofing.com/contact/

- The four locations should not be the first visible item. We think those should move below the form. "Contact us today" with four location specific numbers should be under. We have the toll free at the top of the page for quick reference. 

- AI/Stock gentleman again. Need to leave ASAP. Insert drone photo or footage of completed project. 

Our competitors' "free consult" landing pages: 

https://www.eatonroofing.com/request-quote/
https://rhodenroofing.com/free-estimate
https://keeterroofingremodeling.com/contact-us/
https://allstateshomeimprovement.com/


I will work on getting images. We have a project we think would be a great look but will not have drone footage for a few more days. We could also consider moving our team photo to these pages and featuring a project on the main landing page instead. We are open to any and all ideas. 

Thank you so much for your help with this.  Please let me know if you have any further questions. We would like to expedite this as much as possible. 
 
April

title: Mailchimp
description:
Hi Keith,

Seeking help if its possible to add this to staging before launch?

Seeking help to add this after launch please. 



Adding info verbatim from the client:
Hi Eric,

I am looking for some assistance with Mailchimp. We are experiencing delivery issues, and I need to verify our domain. I have attached a screenshot of the current status for your reference.

Should this be handled by Ryno? I have had difficulty communicating with them recently. Additionally, I am still waiting for feedback regarding the list of phone numbers we requested.

Thank you for your help. 

Mailchimp: aprilalbert@Arroofing.com PW: Roofing4010!

Thanks much! 

 cc

Eric also asked if we can please make sure all logins are working in Wordpress.

Not sure though if we already have access to all of them. Adding the brands and sites here for easy checking:

  • J403 Integrity Roofing - https://integrityrc.com/
  • J405 The Exterior Company - https://theexteriorcompany.com/

Thanks

cc

title: Headings structure service pages update
description:
we need to update the headings structure on 6 service pages, I will show one as an example but all are the same, I will list the ones that need update.

So this is how it looks:

1. Residential roofing services



<H4> Residential Roofing
<H2> reliable service for all your residential roofing needs
<H3> Service Page Sidebar
<H1> Superior Residential Roofing Services

This is the structure now, first of all there is an H3 which I do not know what it is but it needs to be removed Service Bar Sidebar. Then we remove the rest and leave just an H1 here in this section and a text paragraph like this:

<H1> Superior Residential Roofing Services
<Text>
We provide residential roofing services for homeowners across Kansas, Nebraska, Oklahoma, and Missouri, including roof repairs, replacements, and new installations. The service focuses on reliable results, durable materials, and consistent protection to keep homes safe and secure.

2. COmmercial roofing

This is how it is is now:

<H4> Commercial Services
<H2> Your choice for Commercial Roof Replacements, Repair, & Installation
<H3> Service Page Sidebar
<H1> Reliable Commercial Roofing Services

update to:

<H1> Reliable Commercial Roofing Services
<text>
We provide commercial roofing services for businesses across Kansas, Nebraska, Oklahoma, and Missouri, including roof repairs, replacements, and new installations. Our service delivers reliable solutions for commercial properties, helping protect your building and support long-term performance.

3. Roof replacement https://arroofing.com/roofing/repair/

Now:

<H4> Roof Repair
<H2> from minor leaks to major structural damage, we'll identify & address your problems
<H3> Service Page Sidebar
<H1> Professional Roof Repair Services

Update to:

<H1> Professional Roof Repair Services
<text>We provide roof repair services for homeowners and businesses, handling everything from minor leaks to major structural damage. Our team identifies the source of the problem and delivers effective repairs to restore the strength and protection of your roof.

4. Gutters https://arroofing.com/gutters/

Now:

<H4> Gutters
<H2> Gutters that perform & enhance the appearance of your Property
<H3> Service Page Sidebar
<H1> Top-Tier Gutter Installation & Replacement Services in Wichita, KS

Update to:

<H1> Top-Tier Gutter Installation & Replacement Services in Wichita, KS
<text>
We provide gutter installation services for homes and businesses in Wichita, KS, and Missouri. Our service focuses on installing gutters that manage water effectively while improving the overall appearance and protection of your property.

5. Siding https://arroofing.com/siding/

Now:

<H4> Siding
<H2> Make sure your home looks beautiful and is protected for years to come
<H3> Service Page Sidebar
<H1> Siding Services in Wichita, KS

Update to:

<H1> Siding Services in Wichita, KS
<text>We provide siding services for homeowners in Wichita, KS, including installation, replacement, and repairs. Our service helps improve your home’s appearance while adding long-term protection against weather, moisture, and everyday wear, keeping your property looking clean, durable, and well-maintained for years to come.

6. Windows https://arroofing.com/windows/

Now:

<H4> Window Installation
<H2> window styles, materials, and energy-saving options to fit your Lifestyle
<H3> Service Page Sidebar
<H1> Window Installation in Wichita, KS

Update to:

<H1> Window Installation in Wichita, KS
<text>
We provide window installation services for homeowners in Wichita, KS, offering a range of window styles, materials, and energy-efficient options to fit your needs. Our service helps improve comfort, enhance appearance, and support better insulation for your home year-round.


Let me know if you have any questions, I could not find how to edit this section, thanks.
